transcript.text: On 275 and 285, also on Stereo and VHF, this is National Radio 1.
Well, hello there. This is TV on the Radio, Thomas the Vance, and welcome once again to the Friday Rock Show.
And this evening, two of the fine bands who made the Reading Festival audience react in the nicest possible way.
We have the set from Iron Maiden, plus the return to the British stage of a band called Budgie.
And we've got new releases by Gillen, Super Tramp, Joni Mitchell, Cryer, White Spirit and Ozzy Osbourne.
And some classics by Jimi Hendrix and some others as well.
Not forgetting the Friday Night Connection, that time of the week when titillation comes upon your person.
